items.description: A key table definition where the key is the table name.

modal.description: If true, stay in this mode after executing a command.

mount.description: If false, this entire table and its bindings will be ignored.

bundle.description: Path to a bundle YAML file to load as a sub-mode.

mount.description: If false, this specific binding will be ignored.

description.description: A mnemonic description used in the fuzzy search menu.

action.description: The tmux command to run or string to send.

type.description: How to interpret the action: 'exec' runs in terminal, 'send' sends keys, 'run' runs tmux shell command, 'test' displays message.

dependency.description: Only bind this key if the specified command is available in the system PATH.
